metadata.description: Hooks, skills, and automations that extend what Claude Code can do out of the box.

plugins.name: date-context
plugins.description: Injects today's date, day of week, current time, and timezone into Claude's context on every session start.

plugins.name: session-finder
plugins.description: Indexes Claude Code sessions on exit and provides a skill to find past sessions by natural language description.

plugins.name: md-to-gdoc
plugins.description: Convert markdown documents into properly formatted Google Docs using the Google Workspace CLI (gws). Supports custom format profiles extracted from reference Google Docs.

plugins.name: notebooklm-upload
plugins.description: Batch upload local files from directories to Google NotebookLM notebooks. Supports filtering by file type, multiple directories, and dry-run mode.

plugins.name: timewatch-fill
plugins.description: Fill TimeWatch attendance via browser automation with claude-in-chrome. Supports filling a single day, a week, or an entire month of unfilled workdays.
